topic: addition of integers, positive and negative numbers
latex: James has a magic hat full of slips of paper with numbers on them. He gives the hat to his friend Anna who pulls 4 numbers out of the hat: $3$, $-4$, $-2$ and $0$. James then pulls 3 numbers out of the hat: $2$, $4$, and $1$. What is the sum of all of the numbers that James and Anna pulled out of the magic hat?
